summary.summary: Update Config.xcconfig: APP_DEV_VERSION incremented from 0.7.0.17 to 0.7.0.18 (CI/build metadata bump).
summary.userFacingImpact: Likely none for end users — this is a build/CI metadata change (APP_DEV_VERSION) in Config.xcconfig. The change is shown in the commit and diff updating APP_DEV_VERSION to 0.7.0.18. If you need confirmation about any release-process or packaging implications, please review CI/release steps manually.
